projectDescription: A web application that parses university schedule PDFs from the UTM SGU system and lets students visualize, customize, and export their academic timetable to Google Calendar or .ics format.
keyFeatures: PDF schedule parsing with positional text extraction for UTM SGU format
AI-powered fallback schedule extraction via Groq LLM (llama-3.3-70b-versatile)
Interactive weekly schedule grid (desktop) and list (mobile) views
Automatic time conflict detection and visual highlighting
Per-subject color customization and theme switching
Google Calendar sync via Supabase Edge Function with OAuth2 token management
ICS file generation for Apple/Google/Outlook calendar import
Cloud schedule persistence per user with multi-schedule management
OCR fallback via Tesseract.js for scanned image schedules
PDF export of the visual schedule with jsPDF
Responsive design with Framer Motion animations
publicApiSurface: parseScheduleFile(base64Data, mimeType): ParseResult — local regex-based PDF/image parser
parseScheduleFileWithEdge(base64Data): { sessions } — AI-based parser via Supabase Edge Function
saveScheduleToDB(userId, schedule): data — persist schedule to Supabase
getUserSchedules(userId): DBResponseSchedule[] — fetch user's saved schedules
getUserProfile(userId): UserProfile | null — fetch user profile
signUpWithEmail(email, password, fullName): data — register new user
syncCalendarEvents(payload): SyncCalendarResponse — push events to Google Calendar
generateICS(schedule, semesterStart, semesterEnd): void — download .ics file
Edge Function POST /functions/v1/extract-schedule — Groq AI extraction endpoint
Edge Function POST /functions/v1/google-calendar-sync — Google Calendar event creation endpoint
